title: Faithful: PAENoise param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 5.2 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAENoise must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAENoise to range extremes across hosts ['Lights__Static'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=5.15 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAENoise implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAENoise` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts. Worst diverging (host/param/theta -> ddb): [{"host": "SYNTH", "param": "properties/blending/opacity", "kind": "scalar", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 140.93, "ddb": 5.151}, {"host": "SYNTH", "param": "properties/blending/opacity", "kind": "scalar", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 140.93, "ddb": 5.151}, {"host": "SYNTH", "param": "properties/blending/opacity", "kind": "scalar", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.5, "oracle_signal": 140.93, "ddb": 5.151}, {"host": "SYNTH", "param": "properties/blending/opacity", "kind": "scalar", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.75, "oracle_signal": 140.93, "ddb": 5.151}, {"host": "SYNTH", "param": "properties/blending/opacity", "kind": "scalar", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.9, "oracle_signal": 140.93, "ddb": 5.151}, {"host": "SYNTH", "param": "object/noise/width", "kind": "scalar", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 140.857, "ddb": 5.155}]
